name: HeroSplit
description: Two-column hero with headline, subcopy, and primary CTA. Tuned for conversion landing pages.

name: DataTablePro
description: Sortable table with sticky header, row selection, and empty states. Works with large virtualized lists.

name: CommandPalette
description: ⌘K-style command surface with fuzzy search, recent actions, and keyboard-first navigation.

name: ChartShell
description: Responsive chart container with legend slots, tooltip theming, and skeleton loading.

name: FormWizard
description: Multi-step form with validation summaries, stepper, and save-as-draft affordances.

name: ToastStack
description: Global toast region with priority lanes for errors vs. confirmations and swipe-to-dismiss on mobile.

name: AppSidebar
description: Collapsible application sidebar with section headers, badges, and nested routes.

name: MetricTiles
description: KPI tiles with trend sparkline placeholders, delta badges, and comparison periods.
